initial_prompt:

Node depth: 0

Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S6-ahc037-soda
Title: S6. AHC037 / Soda

Problem:
Starting from beverage (0, 0), build a target set of 1000 beverages with desired sweetness and carbonation pairs using a sequence of monotone derivation operations with minimum total cost.

Grading target:
round(10^6 * NL / (1 + C)), where C is total cost and L is the max coordinate scale.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
final_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 2
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}

Synthesis brief from the earlier child-creation step:
Combine the mathematical model of the derivation operations with the calculated minimum cost C. Use the maximum coordinate scale L from the target set to compute the final grading metric: round(10^6 * NL / (1 + C)).

Child results already returned to you:
[
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_01",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Steiner Tree on a DAG\nJUSTIFICATION: Monotone operations create a directed acyclic graph structure."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_02",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Undetermined\nJUSTIFICATION: Missing operations and target points data."
  }
]
